cognito.identitypool.cognitostreams.CfnA: `CognitoStreams` is a property of the [AWS::Cognito::IdentityPool](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-cognito-identitypool.html) resource that defines configuration options for Amazon Cognito streams.

cognito.identitypool.cognitostreams.Role.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role Amazon Cognito can assume to publish to the stream. This role must grant access to Amazon Cognito (cognito-sync) to invoke `PutRecord` on your Amazon Cognito stream.

cognito.identitypool.cognitostreams.Stre.Description: Status of the Amazon Cognito streams. Valid values are: `ENABLED` or `DISABLED`.
The name of the Amazon Cognito stream to receive updates. This stream must be in the developer's account and in the same Region as the identity pool.
